violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Paper towels not provided at both hand washing sinks in the establishment. | HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with pans and baskets. Removed upon request.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in food prep area

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the food prep area noted not smooth easily cleanable.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers and freezers and metal storage shelves noted not in good repair.
